textByHash.00ac9c41ba8fe207413d52d87875892846da200b: Remember, I want the following cooked fish: Swordfish, Bass, Tuna, Salmon, and Shrimp.
textByHash.0eba04c7c804789fea886750ab4cceff8027d0c3: Luck? LUCK? With my cooking skill, I don't really need LUCK.
textByHash.0ed75c714809370f4fc48dd71b02706542f1bc2b: Last I heard he was on some stupid hunt for gold or treasure, somewhere in the desert east of Lumbridge. You might want to ask the traders there about him.
textByHash.1b0789119860eecb63f969224fc5c257d1eb4a2e: Well if you aren't going to listen to the problem, it's fine, don't worry about it. Nothing an experienced chef can't solve himself!
textByHash.1b91dae1e6547981e184652be69e5e4eafd449bf: Why... yes I am, but I don't believe I know you... how did you know my name?
textByHash.1c6c344827814337b4fa9659d05d0f97bc28838e: I require the following cooked fish: Swordfish, Bass, Tuna, Salmon and Shrimp.
textByHash.32f8d1dc900f7e20dd8d0a49d124dd77afebc6b2: As you wish. Let me know if you change your mind.
textByHash.45c2df03de32ecddda5b9d1f5c2864e8fcb0f594: None of us wanted to give up our rights to our brothers, so we didn't want to give up our pieces of the crest, but none of us wanted to face our father by
textByHash.4811701cf3f8510850c2db2825c3e8e3beb2438d: I would, but I am very busy. I am trying to increase my reknown as one of the world's leading chefs by preparing a special and unique fish salad.
textByHash.489a870b833ee0781bfd02576a704c0759b84345: How is the fish collecting going?
textByHash.5344b2a20330cae5078b2c88f13578d0f6ad488e: Well, we haven't really kept in touch... what with the dispute over the crest and all... I did hear from my brother Avan a while ago though.
textByHash.55961de2892d35ee516bef12a0cdd3a6654e99c9: Yes, that is correct. I can slightly alter these gauntlets to allow you some of my skill at preparing seafood by making them cooking gauntlets.
textByHash.59181542a13364f5c104c0269c07a3efdbefd325: Yes certainly, though it will cost you 25,000 coins.
textByHash.75222e5c299a783dbf95efaf10b3478e76bcfce5: Avan always did have expensive tastes however. You may find he is not prepared to hand over his crest piece to you as easily as I have.
textByHash.75ea357bff0d2450ec6f0d5eba7f284ec3efc839: I have received word from my father that you assisted us again! I get the feeling you weren't going to stop trying until you did though.
textByHash.787780ac8f5196d62d8dd4c52bf0856f55337656: Well... my brothers and I had a slight disagreement about it... we all wanted to be heir to my fathers' lands, and we each ended up with a piece of the crest.
textByHash.7a6d60598be4371a7bcae3f0a83173a24e86809c: I suggest you be less careless in the future. The crest is extremely valuable, and utterly irreplaceable.
textByHash.83f0286b27569ec09c8dd5d584a9cbfdf67aba72: How are you doing getting the crest pieces?
textByHash.85abe1dc57a62048400498334e11b1e3108dfc52: Excellent work! Please take it to my father immediately.
textByHash.8785d49277167880f0d8faf339fd2e8ba2758cb6: Yes well... Is there anything I can help you with?
textByHash.8b1cddf2f6c47578e181fa2d76496dbbd14ac8e5: Well, I am the oldest son, so by the rules of chivalry, I am most entitled to be rightful bearer of the crest.
textByHash.93020f5e0631b8a145191981355f3024703ccc22: I hear you have brought the completed crest to my father. I must say, that was awfully impressive work.
textByHash.94a9b9029b23d38feefba5c1ff3897322b07e180: Who are you? What are you after?
textByHash.9de55727fa2a95fc9f26447c626f1f5e2d0495e1: No! Not every problem in my life needs an adventurer to come solve it for me anyway. I'm happy and there's nothing else either!
textByHash.a04d06081946be9cb23d0b3f15f5221efb25431d: He said he was on some kind of search for treasure, or gold, or something out in the desert east of Lumbridge. You might want to ask the traders there about him.
textByHash.a664b9f43f8a1d5dcdf08145fa536523e6358d6b: You will? It would help me a lot!
textByHash.a913ebd58c0feb1c9c18b9b8d8bd5c7ca60c252b: Your gauntlets have already been treated with my potions.
textByHash.afd2c5f6482802001f8615f618d2d4cfe21e2dee: so if you will assist me in my search for the ingredients, then I will let you take my piece as reward for your assistance.
textByHash.b5835ae0d42392c27b870aeba62830ddb336786e: As thanks, I'll provide you with as many pairs of Cooking gauntlets as you wish.
textByHash.bd054e65320d7c1768623bb279836085c7693e13: I would, but I am very busy. I am trying to increase my reknown as one of the worlds' leading chefs by preparing a special and unique fish salad.
textByHash.c03f55f399fbb75f8b57efb965af007f41849790: Well that is true... perhaps it is time to put my pride aside... I'll tell you what: I'm struggling to complete this fish salad of mine,
textByHash.c160cfa3c1c3512fc6497cf355b0ca0f0913ab0d: Hello again. I'm just putting the finishing touches to my masterful salad.
textByHash.c2de7b0b1a10515d3a35cd6250634189d2ef2a70: You will find the rate you burn certain foods is much reduced whilst wearing these gauntlets.
textByHash.c39dabac142fa76ab67a09a884481684c83dfc13: Then why are you wasting your time here?
textByHash.c6c580030012ec27d2f60c8ce5b431e8b981ec91: ... and that's when I found the broken lamping stick. Maybe you could help me investigate?
textByHash.c86708cb4a696e68d2a5079495f96b04eb94dca5: I have some good news for you then. One of my customers found this on their travels and recognised it as mine and returned it to me here.
textByHash.cfeef838df9ae25d78442733a7cc46c4dcd5d994: When you wear them you will burn lobsters, sharks and swordfish a lot less. It will be a permanent modification however, so make sure this is what you want.
textByHash.d1ef0bdb458b565539d3c32d764024c6b8be07f3: I'm a very competent cook! I do not need your assistance . Please leave me be.
textByHash.d638099da282ce1673ea415be949cbd39732925b: returning to him with an incomplete crest... We each went our seperate ways many years past, none of us seeing our father or willing to give up our fragments.
textByHash.d7e9f9888ebe12a05b43c6c65edc100e3a30a34f: You don't have any gauntlets I can imbue.
textByHash.dd67244127b44cc7b74470bf4f65eba99ebfb6d3: I hear you brought the completed crest to my father. I must say, that was awfully impressive work.
textByHash.f9c11e7facc53ef2b385f88f894f2de41c490bdb: It's a valuable family heirloom. I think the least you can do is prove you're worthy of it before I hand it over.
textByHash.ff20db202e4901eec9d5674c5640821a1e574777: Ah... well... hmmm... yes... I do have a piece of it anyway...
